title: Chloe's Animal Snack Time
synopsis: Baby Chloe discovers what different animals like to eat during a magical snack time adventure in her backyard.

pages.text: Chloe sits outside with her snacks. Yummy crackers and juice!

illustration.description: A little girl with short wavy strawberry-blonde hair, light skin, blue-gray eyes sits on a colorful blanket with oversized crackers and a sparkling juice box, steam rising from warm snacks
illustration.alt: Chloe enjoying snacks on a blanket outdoors

pages.text: A fluffy bunny hops over. Bunny wants carrots! Crunch, crunch!

illustration.description: Chloe with short wavy strawberry-blonde hair, light skin, blue-gray eyes offers giant orange carrots to an adorable bunny, sparkles around the crunchy vegetables
illustration.alt: Chloe sharing carrots with a bunny

pages.text: A little bird flies down. Birdie loves seeds! Peck, peck!

illustration.description: Chloe with short wavy strawberry-blonde hair, light skin, blue-gray eyes holds magical glowing seeds while a cheerful bird pecks at them, food sparkles everywhere
illustration.alt: Chloe feeding seeds to a bird

pages.text: A striped cat appears. Kitty wants milk! Lap, lap!

illustration.description: Chloe with short wavy strawberry-blonde hair, light skin, blue-gray eyes pours creamy milk into a bowl for a striped cat, steam and sparkles rising from the fresh milk
illustration.alt: Chloe giving milk to a cat

pages.text: A puppy runs up. Doggy loves treats! Woof, woof!

illustration.description: Chloe with short wavy strawberry-blonde hair, light skin, blue-gray eyes tosses bone-shaped treats to an excited puppy, treats glowing with magical sparkles
illustration.alt: Chloe throwing treats to a happy puppy

pages.text: All the animals are happy! Chloe shares her snacks. Yum!

illustration.description: Chloe with short wavy strawberry-blonde hair, light skin, blue-gray eyes sits surrounded by the bunny, bird, cat, and puppy, all enjoying their foods with magical sparkles and steam creating a feast celebration
illustration.alt: Chloe and all the animals enjoying snack time together

metadata.illustrationStyle: delicious appetizing food, exaggerated proportions, steam drips sparkles, magical food, diverse cuisines, feast celebration, cooking scenes, yummy visual, food joy

questions.question: What does the bunny like to eat?
questions.explanation: Bunnies love to eat carrots! They go crunch, crunch!

questions.question: What does the kitty drink?
questions.explanation: The kitty drinks milk and goes lap, lap!

questions.question: What does Chloe do with her snacks?
questions.explanation: Chloe shares her snacks with all the animal friends!
